overall.description: First-person exploration of a Gryffindor-style common room and adjacent dormitory in a high-fidelity game engine. The player walks through gothic stone corridors, enters a circular timber-framed common room with red decor and four-poster beds, explores a student dormitory, and exits toward a grand staircase. The environment features warm firelight illumination and detailed medieval architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic stone corridor with arched ceilings

events.description: approaching and stopping briefly at the carved wooden door with lion emblem

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the stone corridor toward the common room entrance

entered.detail: gothic stone arch with carved details at the end of the corridor
heavy wooden door with red lion carving representing Gryffindor house
ornate wall-mounted torches providing warm orange light
long red carpet running down the center of the hallway

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow gothic stone corridor with marble floors and a red carpet runner. The camera approaches a heavy wooden door adorned with a red lion emblem, flanked by wall sconces providing warm illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular timber-framed common room with vaulted ceiling

events.description: opening the wooden door and entering the Gryffindor common room
turning to survey the circular room interior and four-poster beds

agents.ego_description: entering the common room and looking around at the beds, furniture, and tapestries

entered.detail: domed ceiling with exposed dark wooden beams radiating from center
dark wood four-poster beds with red curtains and bedding
black iron stove with chimney pipe extending to ceiling
large red wall hanging with tree and figure embroidery

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a spacious circular common room with a high timber-framed ceiling and warm firelight. The room features multiple four-poster beds with red drapery, a central iron stove, and red tapestries on the walls. The player looks around the room before heading back toward the entrance.

events.description: exiting the common room back into the hallway
turning right down the corridor toward the dormitory entrance

agents.ego_description: leaving the common room and walking down the wood-paneled hallway

entered.detail: dark red wood paneling covering the corridor walls
framed paintings hanging on the corridor walls
wooden door leading to the private dormitory room

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the common room into a narrow corridor with dark wood paneling and framed portraits. The player walks down the hallway, passing wall sconces, and approaches a wooden door leading to a private dormitory.

scene_state.functional_zone: student dormitory with writing desk and bed

events.description: entering the private dormitory room with desk and books
turning to view the desk area with tall stacks of books

agents.ego_description: exploring the dormitory, examining the writing desk, book stacks, and bed

entered.detail: wooden desk with green banker's lamp and scattered papers
tall stacks of books piled beside the desk
four-poster bed with red curtains in the dormitory corner
green glass banker's lamp illuminating the desk

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a smaller private dormitory room featuring a writing desk with a green lamp, tall stacks of books, and a four-poster bed. The room has timber-framed walls and a cozy, lived-in appearance with personal items scattered about.

events.description: returning to the common room from the dormitory
walking toward the main exit door of the common room

agents.ego_description: passing through the common room toward the main exit, glancing at the furniture

entered.detail: domed ceiling with exposed dark wooden beams
vintage gramophone with horn speaker on a cabinet

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to the main common room, passing the central stove and four-poster beds from a different angle. The player notices a gramophone on a side cabinet before heading toward the wooden exit door with the lion emblem.

events.description: exiting the common room into the main corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the hallway and climbing the grand stone staircase

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with steps leading upward
ornate oval mirror on wooden console table
carved stone balustrades along the staircase

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera exiting the common room into a corridor with a large ornate mirror, then approaching and ascending a grand stone staircase with carved railings. Potted plants and additional wall sconces line the stairway as the camera climbs upward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a cold gothic corridor into the warm, cluttered interiors of a student living space before ascending toward a grand architectural exit. It begins by gliding down a narrow stone hallway with a red carpet runner, moving toward a heavy wooden door marked with a red lion emblem. As the camera enters the spacious circular common room, the environment shifts to a cozy atmosphere filled with firelight, timber-framed ceilings, and red-draped four-poster beds, before transitioning through a wood-paneled hallway into a private dormitory cluttered with books and a green desk lamp. The scene then loops back through the common room, passing a central iron stove and a gramophone, before exiting once more into the corridor. Finally, the camera passes an ornate mirror and begins to climb a grand stone staircase with carved railings and potted plants, moving upward away from the living quarters.
